title: 2024123Wet Kji245
summary:
Main
· VLCC Freight Market Struggles Amid Weak Demand; Hopes Pinned on China's Import Rebound - The VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) dirty freight market experienced significant challenges in late November, with rates in the Arabian Gulf (AG) dropping to new annual lows. This decline was primarily driven by an oversupply of vessels and subdued demand, particularly for loading windows in the second half of December. While shipowners remain optimistic that the market has reached its floor, a meaningful recovery appears distant, with uncertainty persisting in the near term.
